name: Teen Movie Classics
description: Sharp comebacks and coming-of-age wisdom from the high school movies that defined a generation.
author: Quips Editorial

quotes.content: I hate the way you talk to me, and the way you cut your hair. I hate the way you drive my car. I hate it when you stare. I hate your big dumb combat boots, and the way you read my mind. I hate you so much it makes me sick, it even makes me rhyme. I hate the way you're always right. I hate it when you lie. I hate it when you make me laugh, even worse when you make me cry. I hate it when you're not around, and the fact that you didn't call. But mostly I hate the way I don't hate you, not even close, not even a little bit, not even at all.
quotes.notes: Kat's poem, read aloud in class near the film's climax.

quotes.content: I know you can be overwhelmed, and you can be underwhelmed, but can you ever just be whelmed?
quotes.notes: Often misattributed to Kat Stratford, but it's Chastity's line.

quotes.content: I think you can in Europe.
quotes.notes: Bianca's deadpan reply to Chastity's 'whelmed' line.

quotes.content: Yeah, but I screwed up. I, um, I fell for her.
quotes.notes: Patrick confessing his real feelings to Cameron.

quotes.content: I don't like to do what people expect. Why should I live up to other people's expectations instead of my own?
quotes.notes: Establishes Kat's core defiance.

quotes.content: You burn, you pine, you perish?
quotes.notes: Michael sizing up Cameron's crush on Bianca.

quotes.content: Remove head from sphincter, then drive!
quotes.notes: Yelled at a moped rider who cuts off Kat's car.

quotes.content: This morning, I delivered a set of twins to a fifteen-year-old girl. Do you know what she said to me? She said, 'I should have listened to my father.'
quotes.notes: The gynecologist dad's running joke about teen pregnancy scare tactics.

quotes.content: Looks like you'll just have to miss out on the witty repartee of Joey 'Eat Me' Donner.
quotes.notes: Kat mocking Bianca's crush.

quotes.content: Get in, loser. We're going shopping.
quotes.notes: Regina recruiting Cady into the Plastics.

quotes.content: On Wednesdays, we wear pink.
quotes.notes: The Plastics' rigid dress code, one of the film's most-quoted lines.

quotes.content: Stop trying to make 'fetch' happen. It's not going to happen.
quotes.notes: Regina shutting down Gretchen's slang.

quotes.content: That's so fetch.
quotes.notes: The slang Regina refuses to let catch on.

quotes.content: Four for you, Glen Coco! You go, Glen Coco!
quotes.notes: Damian handing out candy canes at the Christmas pageant; the character's name is often misspelled 'Glenn Coco.'

quotes.content: She doesn't even go here!
quotes.notes: Damian's outburst during the cafeteria brawl.

quotes.content: I'm not like a regular mom, I'm a cool mom.
quotes.notes: Regina's mom trying to bond with the girls.

quotes.content: Grool... I meant to say cool, and then I started to say great.
quotes.notes: Cady's accidental word-blend in front of Aaron Samuels.

quotes.content: I'm sorry that people are so jealous of me... but I can't help it that I'm so popular.
quotes.notes: Gretchen's non-apology during the gym-class apology scene, often misattributed to Regina.

quotes.content: Is butter a carb?
quotes.notes: Regina's diet-obsessed non-sequitur.

quotes.content: That was way harsh, Tai.
quotes.notes: Cher scolding Tai after a cutting remark.

quotes.content: Ugh, as if!
quotes.notes: Cher's catchphrase dismissal.

quotes.content: What, like it's hard?
quotes.notes: Elle's retort to Warner in the Harvard hallway.

quotes.content: Oh my God, the bend and snap — works every time!
quotes.notes: Paulette's excitement after trying Elle's flirting technique.

quotes.content: Screws fall out all the time. The world is an imperfect place.
quotes.notes: Bender's dry philosophy during detention.

quotes.content: ...what we found out is that each one of us is a brain, an athlete, a basket case, a princess, and a criminal.
quotes.notes: From Brian's closing essay to Mr. Vernon.

quotes.content: Life moves pretty fast. If you don't stop and look around once in a while, you could miss it.
quotes.notes: Ferris's direct-to-camera thesis statement.

quotes.content: Bueller? ... Bueller? ... Bueller?
quotes.notes: The deadpan roll-call gag that became the film's signature bit.

quotes.content: Girls only want boyfriends who have great skills.
quotes.notes: Napoleon's list of qualifications for dating.

quotes.content: I caught you a delicious bass.
quotes.notes: Napoleon presenting a fish to Deb as a gift.

quotes.content: Courtney, this isn't a democracy, it's a cheer-ocracy.
quotes.notes: Torrance asserting captain authority over the squad.

quotes.content: The rumors of my promiscuity have been greatly exaggerated.
quotes.notes: Olive addressing her school-wide reputation.
